name: Equipment Loan
description: Two-phase workflow for checking out and returning media equipment

steps.description: Verify patron identity against booking record
steps.notes: Check YU card or government-issued ID

steps.description: Retrieve equipment kit; check all components against printed component list
steps.notes: Each kit should have a printed checklist of included items
Test battery charge indicators; replace with charged batteries if needed

steps.description: Inspect equipment condition; document any existing damage or wear
steps.notes: Note scratches, dings, lens condition, etc. in LibCal booking notes

steps.description: Check out equipment in LibCal system
steps.notes: Update booking status to checked out

steps.description: Provide patron with return instructions and due date reminder
steps.notes: Confirm return time and late fee policy

steps.description: Check all components against printed component list
steps.notes: Verify all items present; note any missing components

steps.description: Inspect equipment condition; compare against checkout notes
steps.notes: Document any new damage; assess whether damage is beyond normal wear

steps.description: Check in equipment in LibCal system
If damage or missing components detected: flag in system and notify supervisor
steps.notes: Follow damage reporting protocol; may require patron contact for fees
